title: PVP Swords
description: This texture gives a makeover to all Minecraft swords making the swords more beautiful and modern, making them take up less of your screen, in other words, this is a great texture for you to use in pvp
body:
![Before x After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8da63e3be2b72ed0c4dce5d4c127cb8d1af17f77.png)

This texture gives a makeover to all Minecraft swords making the swords more beautiful and modern, making them take up less of your screen, in other words, this is a great texture for you to use in pvp
 
This texture modifies the following swords:
 
Diamond Sword
Gold Sword
Wood Sword
Stone Sword
Iron Sword
Netherite Sword

## Ajude Com qualquer Quantia ( Não Reenbolsável )
## [Livepix](https://livepix.gg/heycronus)
